standardBasesDescription: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, hex, base32, base36, base62, base64, and custom bases (2-64).
extendedBasesDescription: Compare Base32, Base36, Base62, and Base64 representations of the same integer.
customBaseDescription: Choose any radix from 2 to 64 for proprietary alphabets or uncommon numeral systems.
invalidInputDescription: This field contains characters that do not belong to the selected base.
